---
title: ""
from: markdown
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: article
    anchor-sections: false
navbar: false
sidebar: false
listing:
  id: latest
  contents: 
    - personal/**/*.qmd
    - work/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 3
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  max-description-length: 100
  grid-columns: 3
  date-format: short
  fields: [date, title, image, description]
  exclude:
    categories: 
    - "draft*"
    - "diary*"
  feed: true
---

<body id="welcome">

# 渡鸦巢

raven's nest | 你好，朋友

![](figs/crow_s.png)<img src="figs/crow_s.png" class="bird-swap" data-hover="figs/crow_s_flip.png"/> ![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png) ![](figs/crow_s.png) ![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png)<img src="figs/crow_s.png" class="bird-swap" data-hover="figs/crow_s_flip.png"/>![](figs/crow_s_flip.png) ![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)<img src="figs/crow_s.png" class="bird-swap" data-hover="figs/crow_s_flip.png"/> ![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png) ![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png)

### 最新 | [全部](archive.qmd)

::: {#latest}
:::

### 探索

<a href="javascript:void(0)" id="random-post-btn" style="cursor: pointer;">随便看看！</a>

[观鸟博客](personal/nd_birding/index.qmd)锐意更新中……

最近都看了些啥？尽在[工业风豆瓣](personal/nd_personal_library/index.qmd)。

[作品](work.qmd){.button} [个人](personal.qmd){.button} [全部](archive.qmd){.button}

[更新日志](log.qmd){.button} [关于](about.qmd){.button} [影集](gallery.qmd){.button}

[电邮](mailto:cosmicraven0530@gmail.com){.button} [RSS](index.xml){.button}

<center>

![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png)<img src="figs/crow_s.png" class="bird-swap" data-hover="figs/crow_s_flip.png"/>![](figs/crow_s_flip.png)![](figs/crow_s.png)

![fluffy little fairy](figs/2605.jpg)

```{=html}
<script>NekoType="kina"</script>
<h1 id=nl><script src="https://webneko.net/n20171213.js"></script><a 
href="https://webneko.net">Neko</a></h1>

<script>
document.getElementById('random-post-btn').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = this;
    const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
    
    btn.innerHTML = '挑选中...';
    btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';

    fetch('search.json')
        .then(response => {
            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('File not found');
            return response.json();
        })
        .then(data => {
            const posts = data.filter(item => 
                item.href && 
                (item.href.includes('personal/') || item.href.includes('work/')) && 
                !item.href.includes('#')
            );

            if (posts.length > 0) {
                const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * posts.length);
                let targetRelativePath = posts[randomIndex].href;

                const basePath = window.location.pathname.replace(/\/[^\/]*$/, '/');
                
                window.location.href = window.location.origin + basePath + targetRelativePath;
            } else {
                alert('No posts found!');
                btn.innerHTML = originalText;
                btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
            }
        })
        .catch(error => {
            console.error('Error:', error);
            alert('Oops! Could not load the blog index.');
            btn.innerHTML = originalText;
            btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
        });
});
</script>
```
